items.summary: Add a backend function `bulkImportInventory` that accepts an array of inventory item records (partNumber, partName, description, quantity, stockThreshold, category, location). For each record: if the partNumber already exists, update the existing item with the new data; if it does not exist, create a new item. Return a result summary containing counts of items created, updated, and skipped, plus an array of skipped row indices with reasons.

Add a CSV Import section to the AdminPanel page that allows an admin to upload a CSV file with the headers: partNumber, partName, description, quantity, stockThreshold, category, location. Parse the CSV client-side, validate each row (required fields present, quantity and stockThreshold are numeric), skip invalid rows, and call the backend `bulkImportInventory` function with the valid rows. Display a results summary after import showing how many items were created, updated, and skipped, along with details of skipped rows and their reasons.
